clEntries.5.11.198: v5.11.197: Added 3 new device fingerprints to driver mappings, enabling direct support for recently released Tuya hardware., Integrated 2,141 upstream device profiles into the compatibility database, improving automatic pairing accuracy for sensors, switches, and climate controllers., Updated manufacturer and product ID matching to recognize newer Tuya OEM variants, reducing manual pairing steps a
clEntries.5.11.197: Added support for 3 new Tuya device fingerprints and integrated 2,141 upstream device profiles to improve automatic pairing and driver matching.
clEntries.5.11.196: Fixed pairing for 151 devices with uppercase manufacturer IDs, updated fingerprints across bulb, button, and sensor drivers, and improved overall Tuya Zigbee compatibility.
clEntries.5.11.195: Bug fixes for climate sensor dual temperature display, critical SDK3 method crash fix, enhanced physical button flow support for multi-gang devices, and 28 new device fingerprints from community sources.
clEntries.5.11.194: Added support for 28 new Tuya device variants, including the Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control. Total coverage now spans .
clEntries.5.11.193: Resolved fingerprint pairing conflicts, added support for new Tuya device variants, and improved SDK compatibility for stable connections.
clEntries.5.11.192: Added 28+ new device fingerprints including Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control. Implemented smart hybrid matching to automatically resolve fingerprint collisions during pairing. Updated RGB bulb driver and refined device pattern recognition for improved stability.
clEntries.5.11.191: Added 28 new device fingerprints, including Nedis SmartLife Radiator Control. Expanded compatibility across switch, sensor, and climate drivers.
clEntries.5.11.190: Added 27 new device fingerprints and low-battery alerts for 113 devices. Fixed SDK v3 flow crashes, restored missing battery capabilities, added time sync for 13 thermostats, and fixed missing capabilities in 10 remote drivers.
clEntries.5.11.189: Added 27 new device fingerprints including Nedis SmartLife Radiator. Fixed SDK v3 flow card crashes, resolved alarm_battery capability conflicts, and restored battery reporting. Added time sync for 13 TRV drivers and fixed missing capabilities in 10 remote drivers.
